questions.question: Explain the difference between a repeater and a hub in a computer network. Provide an example of when you would use each.
questions.hint: Describe the functionality of each device and provide a scenario where they are used differently

questions.question: A network cable is 10 meters long and has a bandwidth of 100 Mbps. If 4 devices are connected to the cable, what is the bandwidth per device?
questions.hint: Use the concept of bandwidth sharing to calculate the bandwidth per device

questions.question: Describe the concept of collision in a token ring topology. How is it resolved?
questions.hint: Explain the collision detection and resolution mechanism used in token ring networks
